title: Usopp Challenges Luffy
description: Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Franky. Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can't go with you any more...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: i won't cause you trouble anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But the ship belongs to the captain...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If I win, I'm taking going merry!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I challenge you to a duel!!!!

summary: Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.
